name: bottega
description: Autonomous issue-to-PR runs for Claude Code. /bottega:deliver takes a task to a delivered PR: a spec agreed on a live shared document with the conversation as fallback and committed to the repo, a panel on costly decisions, parallel builders, cross-family review of the integrated diff always, QA evidence in the PR. /bottega:spec shapes work into an agreed repo spec and tickets instead, and review, land, improve, panel, and setup are available on their own.
